description: Knowledge Lab 內容充實：補強 knowledge items / topics / links / vocab sets / retrieval surfaces，不改主線 artifact contract。
constraints: Must not change source-build artifact contract used by frontend intake.
Must not block LEARNING_LIBRARY_CONTENTKO_MIGRATION or MODULAR_VIEWER_REFACTOR.
Schema changes require separate review and must not be bundled into enrichment execution.

tasks.desc: Inventory current knowledge/topic/link/vocab coverage and identify high-value enrichment gaps from existing staging content.
Define enrichment taxonomy for knowledge items, topic families, retrieval prompts, and vocab-set expansion without changing artifact schema.
Enrich first content packs with additional knowledge items, links, topic relations, and retrieval-facing learner notes.
Run QA pass for TODO leakage, broken links, duplicate concepts, and untranslated learner-facing knowledge fields.
Document rollout policy: enrichment can run in parallel, but cannot modify frontend intake contract or block primary course refactor path.
